storeDescription: EcoFlow — portable power stations, solar panels, and smart energy solutions. Power anything, anywhere.
quickPrompts: There's a storm warning — I want to be prepared this week
I go camping every month and keep running out of battery
I want to cut my electricity bill — where do I start with solar?
I live in my van and need reliable daily power

products.name: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max Portable Power Station
products.description: 2kWh portable power station with 2400W output, expandable capacity up to 6kWh, and fast charging for home backup, RV trips, and off-grid use.

products.name: EcoFlow DELTA 3 Portable Power Station
products.description: Expandable 1–5kWh portable power station with 1800W AC output, X-Boost surge support, and multiple fast recharging methods.

products.name: EcoFlow DELTA 3 Max Plus Portable Power Station
products.description: 2kWh-class portable power station with 3000W output and X-Boost support for heavy-duty appliances during backup or off-grid scenarios.

products.name: EcoFlow RIVER 3 Plus Portable Power Station
products.description: Compact 286Wh portable power station with 600W output, <10ms UPS support, and expandable runtime for light appliances.

products.name: EcoFlow RIVER 3 Portable Power Station
products.description: Small 245Wh portable power station with 300W rated output, X-Boost up to 600W, quiet operation, and UPS-style backup for essential devices.

products.name: EcoFlow NextGen 220W Bifacial Portable Solar Panel
products.description: Foldable 220W bifacial solar panel with 25% conversion rate and IP68 waterproof rating for camping, RV, and off-grid charging.

products.name: EcoFlow 125W Bifacial Modular Solar Panel
products.description: Modular bifacial solar panel with 25% conversion rate and IP68 waterproofing. Available as single panel or in 250W / 500W kits.

products.name: EcoFlow 110W Portable Solar Panel
products.description: Portable lightweight 110W solar panel with up to 23% conversion rate, self-supporting foldable design, and IP68 waterproof durability.

products.name: EcoFlow 60W Portable Solar Panel
products.description: Compact 60W portable solar panel with 25% conversion rate and IP68 waterproof rating for lightweight travel charging.

products.name: EcoFlow WAVE 3 Portable Air Conditioner with Heater
products.description: Portable air conditioner and heater with 6100 BTU cooling and 6800 BTU heating. Runs wirelessly on battery for up to 8 hours.

products.name: EcoFlow GLACIER Classic Portable Fridge Freezer
products.description: Portable fridge freezer for off-grid cooling. Dual-zone options on 45L and 55L models. High-efficiency for travel and outdoor use.

products.name: EcoFlow Smart Generator 3000 (Dual Fuel)
products.description: Dual-fuel smart generator compatible with DELTA series, with automatic start-stop behaviour for seamless home backup.

products.name: EcoFlow RAPID Mag Qi2.2 Magnetic Power Bank
products.description: 10,000mAh magnetic power bank with Qi2.2 wireless charging and built-in USB-C cable for fast phone charging on the go.

products.name: EcoFlow RAPID Pro Desktop Charger 320W
products.description: 320W GaN desktop charger with 5 ports for charging laptops, phones, and tablets simultaneously from one compact hub.
